info.title: LendyPH API
info.description: REST API for LendyPH Lending Application

get.description: Get paginated audit logs with optional filters
Get a specific audit log entry

post.description: Authenticate with username or email and receive an access token

get.description: Get the authenticated user profile with roles and permissions

post.description: Revoke current token and issue a new one

get.description: Get a paginated list of borrowers with search and filters
Get full borrower profile with co-makers and documents

delete.description: Permanently delete a borrower and all related records

get.description: Get all roles with their permissions
Get a specific role with permissions
Get a paginated list of all users
Get a specific user by ID
